data.name: SearchPlaceholder
data.value: What do you want to learn?

data.name: NewsletterHint
data.value: We send exclusive offers and educational tips

data.name: WhatYouWillLearn
data.value: What You Will Learn in This Course?

data.name: AboutPlatform
data.value: An integrated educational platform offering the best courses with high-quality content to help you develop your skills and achieve your goals.

data.name: LoginSubtitle
data.value: Glad to see you again at EduLab

data.name: AddCoursesToWishlist
data.value: Add courses you like to your wishlist

data.name: PasswordMinLength
data.value: Password must be at least 6 characters

data.name: CodeSentTo
data.value: A 6-digit code has been sent to

data.name: ChooseStrongPassword
data.value: Choose a strong password for your account

data.name: WelcomeBackMessage
data.value: Welcome back! Sign in to continue your educational journey

data.name: LastStepToStart
data.value: Last step to start your educational journey

data.name: WeWillHelpYouRecover
data.value: We will help you recover your account easily and securely

data.name: DontWorryWeHelp
data.value: Don't worry, we're here to help you recover access to your account with simple and secure steps.

data.name: WeWillSendCode
data.value: We will send a verification code to your email

data.name: NowYouCanLogin
data.value: You can now login using your new password

data.name: OneStepAway
data.value: You're one step away from joining a community of thousands of learners.

data.name: JoinEduLabDesc
data.value: Join EduLab and discover professional educational courses designed to enhance your skills.

data.name: JoinThousandsOfLearners
data.value: Join thousands of learners and develop your skills

data.name: EnterPersonalInfo
data.value: Enter your personal information to complete registration

data.name: HeroSlide2Title
data.value:
Master
Future Skills Now

data.name: HeroSlide1Desc
data.value: Join EduLab and discover educational courses designed specifically to develop your skills.

data.name: HeroSlide2Desc
data.value: Learn programming, design, and AI with the best instructors in the Arab world.

data.name: HeroSlide1Title
data.value:
Start Your Journey
Educational Today

data.name: HeroSlide3Desc
data.value: An interactive platform offering certified certificates and advanced educational tools to help you reach your goal.

data.name: HeroSlide3Title
data.value:
Develop Yourself
Easily & Smartly

data.name: PreparingNewCourses
data.value: We are preparing new courses launching soon.

data.name: WhatDoYouWantToLearnToday
data.value: What do you want to learn today?

data.name: PreparingContent
data.value: We are preparing the best educational content for you, stay tuned!

data.name: EnrollNowAndGet
data.value: Enroll now in your first course and get

data.name: TopInstructorsComingSoon
data.value: Soon you will find the finest instructors and experts here. Be the first to join us.

data.name: MoreThan1000Courses
data.value: More than 1000 courses waiting for you

data.name: StudyPlansDescription
data.value: Integrated study plans that guide you step by step towards professionalism

data.name: ShareYourExperiencePlaceholder
data.value: Share your experience with this course...

data.name: JoinEduLabAndDiscover
data.value: Join EduLab and discover educational courses designed to develop your technical and practical skills.

data.name: AreYouInstructorJoinUs
data.value: Are you an instructor? Join us

data.name: JoinThousandsInBestPaths
data.value: Join thousands of students in the strongest paths

data.name: ClickAnyIconForSpecialOffer
data.value: Click any icon around the card to view a special offer for this field.

data.name: BusinessAdminOffer
data.value: Learn leadership and marketing with 50% discount for new subscribers.

data.name: CreativeDesignOffer
data.value: Master UI/UX and Graphic Design with the strongest experts.

data.name: YesLifetimeAccess
data.value: Yes, once you subscribe you get permanent access to content and updates.

data.name: JoinThousandsAndDevelopSkills
data.value: Join thousands of learners and develop your skills with the best courses.

data.name: LearnFromBestExperts
data.value: Learn from the best experts in programming, design, and business

data.name: SupportTeam247
data.value: Support team ready to answer your questions and solve problems around the clock.

data.name: CanIAccessCoursesLifetime
data.value: Can I access courses for a lifetime?

data.name: LearnDartAndFlutter
data.value: Learn Dart and Flutter to build apps that work on iOS and Android with one codebase.

data.name: InEduLabAndEarnExtra
data.value: at EduLab and start earning extra income through your expertise.

data.name: ArtificialIntelligenceOffer
data.value: Enter the field of the future and learn Data Science & AI with 40% off.

data.name: LessonsAvailable247
data.value: Lessons available 24/7 via phone or computer, at your own pace.

data.name: SoftwareEngineeringOffer
data.value: Discount 60% on Full-Stack and Flutter paths for a limited time.

data.name: YesCertificatesCertified
data.value: Yes, our certificates are certified and can be added to your resume and LinkedIn profile.

data.name: AndExpertsWorkingInTopTech
data.value: of instructors and experts working in top tech companies.

data.name: FromHTMLToDotNetAndReact
data.value: From HTML/CSS to building integrated applications using .NET and React.

data.name: IntegratedEducationalExperience
data.value: We offer an integrated educational experience combining quality and flexibility

data.name: ChooseFrom1000Courses
data.value: Choose from over 1000 courses in various fields

data.name: GetCertifiedCertificates
data.value: Get certified completion certificates that prove your skills and support your resume.

data.name: MasterLanguagesOffer
data.value: Courses in English and German with a modern interactive approach.

data.name: MasterFigmaTools
data.value: Master Figma tools and create exceptional user experiences for websites and apps.

data.name: BridgingGapDescription
data.value: as an ambitious idea to bridge the gap between academic education and actual labor market requirements in the Arab world.

data.name: Join15000Students
data.value: Join over 15,000 students and start your journey today.

data.name: Since2020WeEmpowered
data.value: Since 2020, we have empowered thousands of students by providing professional educational content focused on practical application and real projects, with a select group of the best trainers in the Arab world.

data.name: BePartOfFutureEducation
data.value: Be Part of the Future of Education

data.name: AboutDescription
data.value: We are here to build a better future through innovative education and digital empowerment.

data.name: ContactSupportPage
data.value: Contact us via the support page

data.name: PrivacyRespected
data.value: We respect your privacy. We never send spam.

data.name: QuestionsAboutTerms
data.value: Do you have questions about these terms?

data.name: NoArticlesInCategory
data.value: No articles in this category yet.

data.name: FAQVideoIssue
data.value: The video is not working, what should I do?

data.name: FAQChangeEmailAnswer
data.value: Yes, through Account Settings then Personal Info. You will need to confirm the new email.

data.name: TryOtherSearchTerms
data.value: Try different search terms or contact support.

data.name: FAQAccessExpiryAnswer
data.value: No! Once purchased, you get lifetime access including all future updates.

data.name: FAQGetCertificateAnswer
data.value: After completing 100% of the course and passing the final exam, the certificate becomes available for download.

data.name: FAQRefundAnswer
data.value: Yes, we offer a 7-day money-back guarantee if you have not exceeded 25% of the course.

data.name: FAQGetCertificate
data.value: How do I get my certificate?

data.name: FAQRegisterAnswer
data.value: Registration is very simple! Click 'Start Now' on the homepage and fill in your basic info.

data.name: FAQPaymentMethodsAnswer
data.value: We support Visa, MasterCard, Meeza, Fawry, Vodafone Cash, and bank transfers.

data.name: FAQMobileAppAnswer
data.value: The platform works great on mobile browsers. Official Android and iOS apps are coming soon.

data.name: FAQChangeEmail
data.value: Can I change my email later?

data.name: FAQVideoIssueAnswer
data.value: Check your internet speed, update your browser, or try lowering video quality.

data.name: SupportTeamReady
data.value: Our support team is ready to help you anytime.

data.name: FAQHowToRegister
data.value: How do I register on the platform?

data.name: FAQRecordedOrLiveAnswer
data.value: Most courses are recorded in high quality. We also organize live workshops occasionally.

data.name: WriteYourMessageHere
data.value: Write your inquiry in detail here...

data.name: HeadquartersAddress
data.value: 123 Technology Street, Smart Village, Giza, Egypt.

data.name: OurTeamAvailable
data.value: Our team is available to help you with any inquiry or technical issue you may face.

data.name: PersonalInfoExample
data.value: Personal information such as name, address, and email.

data.name: PrivacyQuestionsHelp
data.value: If you have any questions about your privacy, we are here to help.

data.name: RequestDeleteData
data.value: Request permanent deletion of your data from our systems.

data.name: SendCourseUpdates
data.value: Send course updates and important platform notifications.

data.name: SecurePaymentInfo
data.value: Secure payment information when completing a purchase.

data.name: PersonalizeExperience
data.value: Personalize your learning experience and suggest relevant content.

data.name: WeMayCollectInfo
data.value: We may collect the following types of information when you use our platform:

data.name: WeUseInfoFor
data.value: We use the information we collect for the following purposes:

data.name: UnderDataProtection
data.value: Under data protection laws, you have the right to:

data.name: SSLEncryptionDesc
data.value: We use the latest SSL encryption and global security standards to keep your personal and financial data completely safe from unauthorized access.

data.name: CourseProgressInfo
data.value: Your progress activity in educational courses.

data.name: AccessYourData
data.value: Access your personal data and request a copy.

data.name: PaymentRequiredDesc
data.value: Some courses and services require payment of fees. When completing a purchase:

data.name: RefundCommitmentDesc
data.value: We are committed to your satisfaction, and therefore offer a clear refund policy:

data.name: AllActivitiesUnderAccount
data.value: All activities that occur under your account.

data.name: KeepLoginConfidential
data.value: Maintaining the confidentiality of your login credentials.

data.name: AgreePayFees
data.value: You agree to pay all applicable fees.

data.name: ActivateAccountViaLink
data.value: Activate your account via the link sent to your email.

data.name: ManageRefundRequests
data.value: Manage refund requests from purchase history

data.name: NoCopyWithoutPermission
data.value: Copy, distribute, or modify content without explicit permission.

data.name: HowCreateNewAccount
data.value: How do I create a new account?

data.name: ContentOwnershipDesc
data.value: All educational content and courses on the platform are owned by us or licensed instructors. It is prohibited to:

data.name: ReportSecurityBreach
data.value: Reporting any suspected security breach immediately.

data.name: ProvideAccurateInfo
data.value: Providing accurate and complete information when registering.

data.name: NoCommercialUse
data.value: Use content for unauthorized commercial purposes.

data.name: NoRemoveCopyright
data.value: Remove any copyright notices from the content.

data.name: TermsAcceptanceDesc
data.value: By using EduLab, you agree to comply with these terms and conditions. If you do not agree with any part, please do not use the platform.

data.name: GetCertificateAfterCompletion
data.value: Once you complete all course lessons and pass the final exam (usually 70%+), the certificate download icon will appear on the course page and in your dashboard.

data.name: HowToAccessCoursesDesc
data.value: How to access courses, tests, and get certificates

data.name: GoverningLawDesc
data.value: These terms and conditions are governed by the laws of Egypt. Any disputes shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of Egyptian courts.

data.name: RefundMax25Percent
data.value: Student progress in the course must not exceed 25% of total content.

data.name: LearnCreateAccountDesc
data.value: Learn how to create your account and start your learning journey

data.name: BillingPaymentRefundDesc
data.value: Billing inquiries, payment methods, and refund policies

data.name: CreateAccountSteps
data.value: To create a new account on EduLab, follow these steps:

data.name: RefundProcessDesc
data.value: Once the request is approved, the amount is returned to the same payment method used.

data.name: SearchSolutionsPlaceholder
data.value: Search for solutions, courses, or guides...

data.name: ClickRegisterButton
data.value: Click on the Register button at the top of the homepage.

data.name: AccountCreationDesc
data.value: To use some features, you may need to create an account. You are responsible for:

data.name: HowGetCourseCertificate
data.value: How do I get a course completion certificate?

data.name: EnterNameEmailPassword
data.value: Enter your name, email, and a strong password.

data.name: PaymentsSubjectToRefund
data.value: All payments are subject to our refund policy.

data.name: YesChangeEmailViaSettings
data.value: Yes, you can change your email through profile settings, you will just need to confirm the new email via a verification code.

data.name: StudentProgressMustNot
data.value: Student progress in the course must not exceed

data.name: SupportTeam247Desc
data.value: The EduLab support team is available 24/7 to answer your inquiries and solve your technical problems.

data.name: RefundWithin7Days
data.value: Refund can be requested within 7 days only from the purchase date.

data.name: ShareYourExperienceWithStudents
data.value: Share your experience with thousands of students worldwide and start your training journey with us today.

data.name: LearnFromBestExpertsWorld
data.value: Learn from the best experts in the world

data.name: WeGatherTopExperts
data.value: We gather the finest specialists and experts to help you build your professional and technical future

data.name: LatestArticlesDesc
data.value: The latest articles, tips, and trends in programming, design, and digital education

data.name: SubscribeDesc
data.value: Subscribe to our newsletter to receive the latest articles, courses, and exclusive offers directly to your inbox.

data.name: Error429Desc
data.value: You have sent too many requests in a short period. Please wait a while before trying again.

data.name: Error500Desc
data.value: An unexpected server error occurred. Please try again later or contact support if the issue persists.

data.name: Error400Desc
data.value: The request sent appears to be invalid or incomplete. You can return to the homepage or contact support.

data.name: Error403Desc
data.value: You do not have sufficient permissions to access this page or perform this action. You can return to the homepage or go back.

data.name: Error504Desc
data.value: The server did not respond in time through the gateway. Please try again later or check your internet connection.

data.name: Error402Desc
data.value: You cannot proceed because this service or content requires payment or an active subscription. You can return to the homepage or go back.

data.name: Error401Desc
data.value: You cannot access this page without logging in or having the required permissions. You can return to the homepage or login.

data.name: Error408Desc
data.value: The request timed out. Please try again or check your internet connection.

data.name: Error503Desc
data.value: The service is currently unavailable due to maintenance or server overload. Please try again later.

data.name: Error404Desc
data.value: The page you are looking for is unavailable or has been moved. You can return to the homepage or contact support.

data.name: Error502Desc
data.value: The server received an invalid response from another server. Please try again later or contact support.

data.name: CartEmptyDesc
data.value: Investing in your skills is the shortest path to success. Start now and discover unique courses that match your ambitions.

data.name: CartNoCourses
data.value: You haven't added any courses yet

data.name: RemoveItemError
data.value: An error occurred while removing the item

data.name: CheckoutConfirmMsg
data.value: Are you sure you want to complete the purchase?

data.name: AvailabilityCheckError
data.value: An error occurred while checking product availability

data.name: CartEmptyCheckoutError
data.value: Your cart is empty. Add courses before proceeding to checkout

data.name: ClearCartError
data.value: An error occurred while clearing the cart

data.name: ClearCartDesc
data.value: Once you clear the cart, all saved courses will be removed. This action cannot be undone.

data.name: 247SupportDesc
data.value: We provide continuous support whenever you need it

data.name: CongratulationsPurchase
data.value: Congratulations! You have successfully purchased the course!

data.name: SecurePaymentDesc
data.value: All financial transactions are secure and protected

data.name: CheckEmailForDetails
data.value: Course details will be sent to your email

data.name: SaveDataDesc
data.value: Your name, email, and billing address will be saved to speed up future payments

data.name: MoneyBackGuaranteeDesc
data.value: 7-day refund period according to the terms

data.name: PostalCodeError
data.value: Please enter a valid postal code (5 digits)

data.name: PhoneError
data.value: Please enter a valid phone number

data.name: RefundReasonPlaceholder
data.value: What didn't you like about the course? We'd love to hear your feedback to improve our service.

data.name: RefundNotAvailableTooltip
data.value: Refund not available after 7 days or when exceeding 25% progress

data.name: RefundPolicy
data.value: Remember: You can request a refund only within 7 days of purchase, provided your progress is less than 25%.

data.name: RefundSuccessMsg
data.value: Your refund request has been processed. The amount will be credited to you shortly.

data.name: RefundRequestDesc
data.value: Quick step to refund your purchase

data.name: NoTransactionsDesc
data.value: Start your learning journey today and explore our featured courses

data.name: TransactionsSubtitle
data.value: Track your purchases and refund requests

data.name: RefundErrorMsg
data.value: We couldn't process your request at this time.

data.name: TechErrorMsg
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while processing your request. Please try again later.

data.name: ScanQRDesc
data.value: Scan the QR code using an authenticator app (Google Authenticator / Authy)

data.name: Disable2FAConfirmMsg
data.value: Are you sure you want to disable two-factor authentication? This will reduce your account security level.

data.name: Disable2FAConfirmMsg2
data.value: Confirm disabling two-factor authentication? This will reduce your account security level.

data.name: LogoutDeviceConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to log out of this device?

data.name: DataCopyDesc
data.value: An organized file containing all your personal information

data.name: EndAllSessionsConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to end all other sessions?

data.name: SupportDesc
data.value: We are here to help with any inquiry or technical issue. Feel free to contact us!

data.name: DeleteAccountConfirmMsg
data.value: Warning: This action cannot be undone! Your account and all data will be deleted. Are you sure you want to proceed?

data.name: TwoFactorActiveDesc
data.value: Your account is now protected and secured.

data.name: NotActiveDesc
data.value: Enable the option above to protect your account with a strong security layer

data.name: ScanQR
data.value: Scan the QR code using an authenticator app

data.name: SettingsSubtitle
data.value: Manage your profile, security, notifications and more

data.name: OTPRequired
data.value: This field is required and must be 6 digits

data.name: SupportHours
data.value: Support Hours: Sat - Thu | 9:00 AM - 10:00 PM

data.name: DeleteAllConfirmMsg
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete all notifications? This action cannot be undone.

data.name: ConfirmDeleteMsg
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this notification?

data.name: MarkAllReadConfirmMsg
data.value: Are you sure you want to mark all notifications as read?

data.name: DeleteNotifError
data.value: An error occurred while deleting the notification

data.name: DeleteAllError
data.value: An error occurred while deleting all notifications

data.name: NoNotificationsDesc
data.value: No notifications matching your search criteria were found

data.name: LoadError
data.value: An error occurred while loading notifications

data.name: DeleteNotifConfirmMsgPrefix
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete the notification

data.name: NotificationsSubtitle
data.value: Manage all your notifications in one place

data.name: MarkAllReadError
data.value: An error occurred while marking notifications as read

data.name: NoInstructorsDesc
data.value: New instructors will be added soon. Follow us for the latest updates.

data.name: CTADesc
data.value: We provide all the tools you need to create and sell your educational courses. Join our expert community and start changing thousands of students' lives today.

data.name: SearchInstructor
data.value: Search for an instructor by name or specialty...

data.name: InstructorHeroDesc
data.value: Discover your passion and learn new skills with the best specialized instructors in technology, design, and business.

data.name: SelectLocationFirst
data.value: Please select a location on the map first

data.name: Review1
data.value: Great course with rich content. The instructor explains in a simple and smooth way. I benefited greatly.

data.name: AboutPlaceholder
data.value: Write a short bio about your experience, skills, and interests...

data.name: DeleteCertMsg
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete the certificate

data.name: Review2
data.value: Excellent explanation and practical examples. One of the best courses I have taken in programming. I recommend it to everyone.

data.name: ClickMapToSelect
data.value: Click on the map to select your location

data.name: NoEnrolledCoursesDesc
data.value: Start your learning journey by exploring available courses on our platform

data.name: ProfileSubtitle
data.value: Welcome back! Here's a quick overview of your account

data.name: FollowSuccess
data.value: You are now following this instructor

data.name: InstructorReview2
data.value: An amazing experience with this instructor. The course was comprehensive and covered everything promised. Thank you for the effort.

data.name: MinCommentLength
data.value: Please write a comment with at least 10 characters

data.name: InstructorReview1
data.value: The instructor is excellent, explaining complex concepts in a simple and easy-to-understand way. I highly recommend joining their courses.

data.name: DragDropFile
data.value: Drag and drop file here or

data.name: TermsRequired
data.value: You must agree to the terms and conditions

data.name: FileSizeError
data.value: File size must be less than 10MB

data.name: CommunityDesc
data.value: Join thousands of instructors and learners in our community

data.name: ReviewImportantMsg
data.value: Please review your information before submitting. After submission, our team will review your application and contact you within 3-5 business days.

data.name: ApplySubtitle
data.value: Join our distinguished educational community and share your expertise with thousands of learners worldwide. Start your journey as an instructor on EduLab today.

data.name: ToolsDesc
data.value: Use our advanced tools to create outstanding educational content

data.name: ProfitsDesc
data.value: Get competitive profit rates on your courses

data.name: DragDropImage
data.value: Drag and drop image here or

data.name: SkillsRequired
data.value: Please add at least one skill

data.name: ImageSizeError
data.value: Image size must be less than 5MB

data.name: RejectedMessage
data.value: Your application has been rejected. You can edit your information and submit a new application.

data.name: UpdateNotification
data.value: Your application status has been updated

data.name: NoApplicationsDesc
data.value: You can submit your first application to join as an instructor on our platform

data.name: ApprovedMessage
data.value: Your application has been approved! You can now start creating courses.

data.name: RejectedMessage
data.value: Your application has been rejected. You can edit your information and submit a new application.

data.name: ApprovedMessage
data.value: Your application has been approved! You can now start creating courses.

data.name: StartLearningToday
data.value: and start your learning journey today

data.name: SearchPlaceholder
data.value: What do you want to learn today?

data.name: InVariousFields
data.value: across various fields, designed by experts to suit your needs.

data.value: An error occurred while adding the course to cart

data.value: An error occurred while removing the course from favorites

data.value: Select a lecture from the sidebar to start

data.value: Your browser does not support video playback

data.value: Enjoy an advanced video experience with full control

data.name: ChooseLectureToStartLearning
data.value: Choose a lecture from the sidebar to start learning.

data.value: You can rate this course after completing 80% of the content

data.name: CongratsCompleted80Percent
data.value: Congratulations! You have completed 80% of the course

data.name: HelpUsImproveRating
data.value: Help us improve the learning experience with your rating

data.value: Video playback error. Check your internet connection and try again.

data.value: Share your opinion about the course

data.name: HowDoYouRateExperience
data.value: How do you rate your experience with the course?

data.value: Write your comment here... Share your experience with the course and what you liked or can be improved...

data.name: RatingFair
data.value: Fair - needs a lot of improvement

data.value: Organize educational courses into specific fields and specializations.

data.value: Search by category name or ID...

data.value: Related courses will not be deleted, but will be unlinked.

data.value: You are about to permanently delete {0} categories.

data.name: ErrorProcessingRefund
data.value: An error occurred while processing refund request

data.name: DefaultStudentAbout
data.value: Welcome to my profile. You can edit the information through the edit profile button.

data.name: ErrorLoadingProfile
data.value: An error occurred while loading the profile

data.name: ErrorLoadingInstructorProfile
data.value: An error occurred while loading the instructor profile

data.name: ErrorUpdatingProfile
data.value: An error occurred while updating the profile

data.value: You did not select an image

data.name: ErrorUploadingImage
data.value: An error occurred while uploading the image

data.name: ErrorUpdatingInstructorProfile
data.value: An error occurred while updating the instructor profile

data.name: ErrorUploadingInstructorImage
data.value: An error occurred while uploading instructor image

data.name: ErrorAddingCertificate
data.value: An error occurred while adding the certificate

data.name: ErrorDeletingCertificate
data.value: An error occurred while deleting the certificate

data.name: WelcomeBackAdmin
data.value: Welcome back, Admin

data.name: DashboardSubtitle
data.value: Here's a quick overview of what's happening on your educational platform today.

data.name: HistorySubtitle
data.value: Monitor and track all operations performed within the control panel.

data.name: HistorySearchPlaceholder
data.value: Search by username or operation type...

data.name: RolesSubtitle
data.value: Control access levels and system permissions for each user category.

data.name: RolesSearchPlaceholder
data.value: Search by role name or description...

data.name: CannotDeleteUsedRole
data.value: Cannot delete a role in use

data.name: DeleteRoleConfirmPrefix
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete role

data.name: DeleteRoleWarning
data.value: All permissions associated with this role will be revoked.

data.name: BulkDeleteRolesPrefix
data.value: You are about to permanently delete

data.name: UserPageSubtitle
data.value: Control permissions and accounts of all platform users from one place.

data.name: SearchUserPlaceholder
data.value: Search by name, email or phone...

data.name: CreateNewAccount
data.value: Create a new account for the platform

data.name: ConfirmLockMessage
data.value: Are you sure you want to lock {0}?

data.name: ConfirmUnlockMessage
data.value: Are you sure you want to unlock {0}?

data.name: ConfirmDeleteUserMessage
data.value:
Are you sure you want to delete {0}?
This action cannot be undone

data.name: ConfirmBulkDeleteUsers
data.value: You are about to permanently delete {0} users.

data.name: CannotDeleteIncompatible
data.value: Users who cannot be deleted (instructors with courses or enrolled students) were unchecked

data.name: ErrorLoadingPermissions
data.value: An error occurred while loading permissions

data.name: CoursePageSubtitle
data.value: Manage educational content and verify the quality of published courses.

data.name: SearchCoursePlaceholder
data.value: Search for a course, instructor, or specialization...

data.name: ConfirmDeleteCourse
data.value:
Are you sure you want to delete course {0}?
All lectures and related data will be permanently deleted

data.name: ConfirmBulkDeleteCourses
data.value: You are about to permanently delete {0} courses.

data.name: ApplicationsSubtitle
data.value: Review and verify applications for joining the teaching staff at the academy.

data.name: SearchApplicationsPlaceholder
data.value: Search by applicant name, email, or specialization...

data.name: ConfirmAcceptMessagePrefix
data.value: Are you sure you want to accept

data.name: ConfirmAcceptMessageSuffix
data.value: as an official instructor at the academy?

data.name: ConfirmRejectMessagePrefix
data.value: Are you sure you want to reject the application of

data.name: NotificationCenterSubtitle
data.value: Send targeted notifications to users based on their groups

data.name: SendEmailDesc
data.value: Send an email message to users

data.name: QuickTemplatesDesc
data.value: Click any template to auto-fill the form

data.name: WelcomeTemplateContent
data.value: Welcome to our platform! We are happy to have you join us.

data.name: NewCourseTemplateContent
data.value: We are pleased to announce the launch of a new course in programming.

data.name: SystemUpdateTemplateContent
data.value: Some system updates will be performed.

data.name: FormFilledSuccess
data.value: Form filled successfully! You can edit the content as needed.

data.name: SelectSendMethod
data.value: Please select at least one send method (email or notification)

data.name: NewCourseTemplateContentFull
data.value:
We are pleased to announce the launch of a new course in web development. In this course, you will learn the latest programming techniques and build integrated web applications.

Register now and get 20% discount for new students!

Best regards,
Platform Team

data.name: SystemUpdateTemplateContentFull
data.value:
Some system updates will be performed next Friday from 2-4 AM. During this time, the system may be temporarily unavailable.

We apologize for any inconvenience and are working to improve your experience.

Thank you for your understanding,
Technical Support Team

data.name: CannotDeleteWithStudents
data.value: Cannot delete a course with enrolled students

data.name: ConfirmDeleteCourseHtml
data.value:
Are you sure you want to delete course ?
All lectures and related data will be permanently deleted

data.name: BulkDeleteWarningHtml
data.value: You are about to delete 0 courses permanently.

data.name: FillBasicCourseInfo
data.value: Fill in the basic information for the educational course

data.name: CourseTitlePlaceholder
data.value: Example: Learn Web Development with ASP.NET Core

data.name: ShortDescriptionPlaceholder
data.value: Example: A practical course to learn web development basics with easy and fast steps

data.name: FullDescriptionPlaceholder
data.value: Example: In this course you will learn web development using ASP.NET Core with practical applications, from basics to building a complete project.

data.name: CourseGivesCertificate
data.value: This course grants a certificate upon completion

data.name: OrganizeCourseContent
data.value: Organize the course content into sections and lectures professionally

data.name: DragDropHint
data.value: Arrange sections and lectures using drag and drop

data.name: DivideContentHint
data.value: Divide the course content into logical sections and add appropriate lectures for each section to create a distinguished learning experience

data.name: NoLecturesInSectionYet
data.value: No lectures in this section yet

data.name: LectureDescPlaceholder
data.value: Enter a brief description for the lecture...

data.name: MakeFreePreview
data.value: Make this lecture a free preview

data.name: ReviewFinalRequirements
data.value: Review the information and add final requirements

data.name: ReqMin3Requirements
data.value: • You must add at least 3 requirements in the requirements section

data.name: ReqMin3Learnings
data.value: • You must add at least 3 learning objectives in the what students will learn section

data.name: TargetAudiencePlaceholder
data.value: Describe the target audience for this course

data.name: BrowserNotSupportVideo
data.value: Your browser does not support video playback.

data.name: PriceMustBePositive
data.value: Price must be a positive value

data.name: DiscountCannotExceedPrice
data.value: Discount cannot be greater than the price

data.name: DiscountMustBePositive
data.value: Discount must be a positive value

data.name: FileTypeNotSupported
data.value: File type not supported. Please upload an image (JPEG, PNG, GIF)

data.name: FileTooLarge5MB
data.value: Image size is too large. Maximum is 5MB

data.name: FillRequiredFields
data.value: Please fill all required fields correctly

data.name: AddAtLeastOneSection
data.value: Please add at least one section

data.name: AllLecturesNeedTitle
data.value: All lectures must have a title

data.name: VideoLecturesNeedDuration
data.value: All video lectures must have a valid duration

data.name: VideoLecturesNeedFile
data.value: You must upload a video file for video-type lectures

data.name: AddAtLeast3Requirements
data.value: You must add at least 3 requirements

data.name: AddAtLeast3Learnings
data.value: You must add at least 3 learning objectives

data.name: VideoFormatNotSupported
data.value: File type not supported. Please upload a video (MP4, AVI, MOV)

data.name: VideoTooLarge
data.value: Video size is too large. Maximum is 500MB

data.name: VideoProcessingError
data.value: An error occurred while processing the video

data.name: ConfirmRemoveVideo
data.value: Are you sure you want to remove the video file?

data.name: ConfirmDeleteSection
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this section?

data.name: ConfirmDeleteLecture
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this lecture?

data.name: ErrorCreatingCourse
data.value: An error occurred while creating the course

data.name: ClickToUploadVideo
data.value: Click to upload a video file

data.name: ResourcesFormatHint
data.value: PDF, DOC, PPT, ZIP, Images (Max: 20MB per file)

data.name: ResourceAddError
data.value: An error occurred while adding the resource

data.name: ConfirmDeleteResource
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this resource?

data.name: ResourceDeleteServerFailed
data.value: Failed to delete resource from server

data.name: ResourceDeleteError
data.value: An error occurred while deleting the resource

data.name: ConfirmDeleteVideo
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete the video? This action cannot be undone.

data.name: VideoWillBeDeletedOnSave
data.value: The video will be deleted when saving changes

data.name: VideoDeleteError
data.value: An error occurred while deleting the video

data.name: CourseUpdateError
data.value: An error occurred while updating the course

data.name: SectionMustHaveLecture
data.value: Section "{0}" must contain at least one lecture

data.name: ConfirmRemoveResource
data.value: Are you sure you want to remove this resource?

data.name: CategoryCreateFailed
data.value: Failed to create category, name already exists

data.name: CategoryUpdateFailed
data.value: Failed to update category, name already exists

data.name: CategoriesBulkDeleteFailed
data.value: Failed to delete some or all categories, some may be linked to courses

data.name: HistoryLoadError
data.value: An error occurred while loading history data

data.name: HistoryUserLoadError
data.value: An error occurred while loading history for user {0}

data.name: RoleCreateFailed
data.value: Failed to create role, name already exists

data.name: RoleUpdateFailed
data.value: Failed to update role, name already exists

data.name: RoleDeleteFailedLinked
data.value: Failed to delete role because it is linked to users

data.name: RolesBulkDeleteFailed
data.value: Failed to delete some roles because they are linked to users

data.name: PermissionsUpdateFailed
data.value: Failed to update permissions, role may not exist

data.name: ErrorOccurredProcessing
data.value: An error occurred while processing your request.

data.name: DevModeDesc
data.value: Swapping to Development environment will display more detailed information about the error that occurred.

data.name: DevModeWarning
data.value: The Development environment shouldn't be enabled for deployed applications. It can result in displaying sensitive information from exceptions to end users.

data.name: DevModeDetails
data.value: For local debugging, enable the Development environment by setting the ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT environment variable to Development and restarting the app.

data.name: CourseAcceptedNotification
data.value: Course has been approved for publishing

data.name: CourseIssueReportedNotification
data.value: An issue has been reported in a course

data.name: StudentEnrolledNotification
data.value: A new student enrolled in your course

data.name: HistoryDescription
data.value: View all events and operations in the system

data.name: NoEventsDescription
data.value: No events were found in the system

data.name: DeleteConfirmationPrefix
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete course

data.name: ErrorBulkDeleting
data.value: An error occurred while bulk deleting

data.name: ErrorFetchingDetails
data.value: An error occurred while fetching course details

data.name: IrreversibleAction
data.value: This action cannot be undone, the course will be permanently deleted.

data.name: NoSectionsYet
data.value: No sections registered for this course yet.

data.name: PleaseSelectAction
data.value: Please select an action from the list

data.name: QuickLookContent
data.value: Quick look at content and pricing

data.name: SectionMustHaveLecture_Suffix
data.value: must contain at least one lecture

data.value: {0} to create a distinguished learning experience

data.value: Performance of your courses and students on the education platform.
